arts.sum: Manchester City star Rodri has made it clear he’d take the signing of Nico Williams for his club amid the Spanish winger being linked with the likes of Arsenal and Liverpool. arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest transfer news: Brighton & Hove Albion forward Evan Ferguson on radar for January?
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are allegedly contemplating whether to make an approach for Brighton & Hove Albion forward Evan Ferguson during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Belief Nottingham Forest and Crystal Palace could be tempted by €25m January signing – May be offered to them
arts.sum: Juventus’ Nicolò Fagioli could be an option for Nottingham Forest and Crystal Palace in the winter market. The midfielder isn’t key part of Thiago Motta’s plans at the Serie A side and is limited to four league starts this season. Tuttosport state this hasn’t stopped the 23-year-old from being courted by several English clubs.
